# awesome-ai-api (full dump for LLMs)

> Full, machine-readable leaderboard of AI API gateways, formatted for LLM ingestion.
> Snapshot: 2026-04-22 22:51 SGT. Total: 206. API-confirmed: 101.
> Canonical site: https://mackding.github.io/awesome-ai-api/
> Source repo: https://github.com/MackDing/awesome-ai-api
> License: MIT (code) + CC0 (data)

## Top 50 Gateways (sorted by score)

1. AIHubMix — https://aihubmix.com — score 9.9, API verified, region global, engine openrouter, latency 545ms, uptime 100.0% over 1 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, chatgpt, openai, deepseek
2. PackyAPI (PackyCode) — https://www.packyapi.com — score 9.6, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 268ms, uptime 100.0% over 1 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, openai
3. ClaudeCN — https://claudecn.top — score 9.6, API verified, region cn, engine unknown, latency 2597ms, uptime 100.0% over 1 samples, models: claude, gpt, gemini, openai
